heading: Procedure for promulgation of regulations
label: 1455 Procedure for promulgation of regulations
notes: References in TextThe effective date of this Act, referred to in subsec. (d), refers to the effective date of which enacted this chapter to take effect . See Effective Date note set out under .Pub. L. 89–755section 1451 of this titleJuly 1, 1967

Change of Name“Department of Health and Human Services” substituted for “Department of Health, Education, and Welfare” in subsec. (a), pursuant to , which is classified to , Education.section 509(b) of Pub. L. 96–88section 3508(b) of Title 20

children.heading: Hearings by Secretary of Health and Human Services
children.label: a Hearings by Secretary of Health and Human Services
children.text: Regulations promulgated by the Secretary under section 1453 or 1454 of this title shall be promulgated, and shall be subject to judicial review, pursuant to the provisions of subsections (e), (f), and (g) of . Hearings authorized or required for the promulgation of any such regulations by the Secretary shall be conducted by the Secretary or by such officer or employees of the Department of Health and Human Services as he may designate for that purpose.section 371 of title 21

children.heading: Judicial review; hearings by Federal Trade Commission
children.label: b Judicial review; hearings by Federal Trade Commission
children.text: Regulations promulgated by the Commission under section 1453 or 1454 of this title shall be promulgated, and shall be subject to judicial review, by proceedings taken in conformity with the provisions of subsections (e), (f), and (g) of in the same manner, and with the same effect, as if such proceedings were taken by the Secretary pursuant to subsection (a) of this section. Hearings authorized or required for the promulgation of any such regulations by the Commission shall be conducted by the Commission or by such officer or employee of the Commission as the Commission may designate for that purpose.section 371 of title 21

children.heading: Cooperation with other departments and agencies
children.label: c Cooperation with other departments and agencies
children.text: In carrying into effect the provisions of this chapter, the Secretary and the Commission are authorized to cooperate with any department or agency of the United States, with any State, Commonwealth, or possession of the United States, and with any department, agency, or political subdivision of any such State, Commonwealth, or possession.

children.heading: Returnable or reusable glass containers for beverages
children.label: d Returnable or reusable glass containers for beverages
children.text: No regulation adopted under this chapter shall preclude the continued use of returnable or reusable glass containers for beverages in inventory or with the trade as of the effective date of this Act, nor shall any regulation under this chapter preclude the orderly disposal of packages in inventory or with the trade as of the effective date of such regulation.
